title: Grug
description: Palladium (Meme) Addon for 1.20.1 that adds Grug to Minecraft. Why? cuz it rhymes with Grug
body:
### Grug is an Addon for Palladium
\
**A Meme Addon**

This Addon offers players the chance to become the Immaculate Aura-Filled sigma gigachad known only as Grug. Be warned! After playing this absolute brainrot of an addon, you may be left in a state where you can only say Grug catchphrases like "I am a caveman!!!" and "cuz it rhymes with grug" irl. 

How to become Grug? Find Grug's Cave, there's plenty scattered around the Overworld. There's only a small chance you'll find Grug's rock. If you do, equip it and you become Grug.

_**Disclaimer: This is a Meme Addon and not to be taken seriously.**_

_Notice: Unlike **[Sym's Armored Industries](https://modrinth.com/mod/syms-armored-industries)** and **[SymFormers](https://modrinth.com/mod/symformers)** (also developed by SymbioteSpidey), **this (Grug) isn't a Mod** and is not associated with the Quality of Mods put out by the Team at **ComicCraft**_

[ComicCraft Discord](https://discord.com/invite/comiccraft 'ComicCraft Discord')

# Features:
- Become Grug
- Harness Grug's Aura by Levelling it Up in the Skill Tree to Boost his Damage until he becomes Unstoppable!
- That's pretty much it... There's nothing else to do. No abilities, nothing
  - We plan to add abilities later. Full disclosure, we took only 1-2 hours to make this Addon. All time and resources were spent on our actual High Quality Mods: **[Sym's Armored Industries](https://modrinth.com/mod/syms-armored-industries)** and **[SymFormers](https://modrinth.com/mod/symformers)** so check those out and expect more High Quality Content from **ComicCraft**


## Mod Requirements:
[Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium), [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib), [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs), [Rhino](https://modrinth.com/mod/rhino), [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api), [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui), [Curios API (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)/[Trinkets (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets)

## Official Server
- Server IP: **_Palladium.ComicCraft.net_**
- [Modrinth ModPack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/palladium-superheroes-server)
- [CurseForge ModPack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/palladium-superheroes-server)
- _Notice: This is only the Official Server for ComicCraft Mods made using Palladium (specifically, Sym's Armored Industries and Symformers). This is not the Official Server for the Palladium Mod in General!_
  - _We don't associate this Server with this subpar Grug Addon. Check out our actual Mods, that's where it's at baby_

## FAQ

<details>
<summary>Click to view FAQ</summary>
Why is this Addon so garbage?
- Because it's a Meme Addon with barely any time put into it. It was only made because I (SymbioteSpidey) wanted Grug as a joke character on my ComicCraft's Official Server. Check out ComicCraft's actual Mods if you are looking for High Quality Content

Will Abilities be added?
- If there's time, we plan to add some abilities like The Slap of God, Rock Throw, etc. Basically a bunch of Grug and Nic Cage Themed Abilities.
It's why Grug is so rare to get because he might be the most OP character at one point...

Why do the Aura Boost Upgrades cost so much EXP!?
- Because it's Aura... You have to make sacrifices to get Aura and if you don't get that then you have Negative Aura fr.
- Seriously though, it costs that much because eventually Grug will one shot anything. Only downside is that Grug's durability (as of right now) is non-existent so he can get 1 shot as well.
  - Grug Durability Upgrades will be added later and cost a lot as well
</details>

# Credits
